Background: A senior agent of the Drunken Crow Information Guild. He is Minari's best agent as well as a childhood friend, treating her like an older sister. He is the younger twin brother of Sena, following her and Minari everywhere. In his childhood, his village was destroyed by a mad wizard and his corrupt knights. He escaped along with his sister and Minari thanks to the fortunate intervention of a rogue golem soldier. The covert operations executed by Ruras and his sister helped propel the Drunken Crow to it's current standing. Enjoys sweets and cute things.
